summary: Frontend-only testing of Kawaii Sticker Trader trade screen 3D Dished Depth UI rewrite. All testIDs present, all zones rendered, all game interactions functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Trade screen requires 'Start Trading!' button click from home screen - direct navigation to /trade tab not available without this flow

issues: Deprecated style props warnings: 'shadow*' style props should use 'boxShadow', 'props.pointerEvents' should use 'style.pointerEvents' - cosmetic, no visual impact

action_items: Optional: Migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow to clear deprecation warnings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade screen uses home screen 'Start Trading!' button to navigate. All trade screen testIDs verified. QuiltBackground renders pink/lavender diamonds visually.

test_results.quilt_background: VISIBLE - pink/lavender diamond tiles rendering behind all zones
test_results.4_zone_layout: INTACT - willingness bar, AI offer tray, player drop zone, action bar, card fan all present
test_results.dish_well_appearance: PRESENT - recessed/inset gradient borders on AI Offer and Player Offer zones
test_results.action_buttons: CORRECT - Reject=rose-pink gradient, Haggle=lavender gradient, Accept=gray(inactive)/mint(active)
test_results.speech_bubble: VISIBLE - raised pillow look with pink border on Neko bubble
test_results.card_tap_to_offer: WORKING - tapping fan card adds to player offer zone
test_results.reject_button: WORKING - clears player offer and shows empty drop zone
test_results.haggle_button: WORKING - adds AI card (1 → 2 cards confirmed)
test_results.accept_active_state: CODE VERIFIED - green pulsing animation triggers when willingnessLevel >= 100
